description: §40.1.1 — an app whose auth gate declares a redirect target (default `/login` from <program auth="required">) but with no page in the compilation unit matching that path fires W-AUTH-LOGIN-MISSING (warning): the runtime auth-check would 302 to a 404. (The per-gate I-AUTH-REDIRECT-UNRESOLVED info co-fires.)
rationale: §40.1.1: <program auth="required"> yields a default loginRedirect of `/login`; when no gate's redirect resolves to an authored page (unresolvedTargets non-empty, anyResolved false) the structural-gap warning fires so the missing login page is surfaced loudly.
